description: Master CRM build: merge 4 historical sources into a unified contact table in D1. Every transformation is explicit. No inference, no hallucination.

d1_users.notes: Highest priority for email, name, user_id linkage. Auth source of truth.

airtable_master.name: Master Record List
airtable_master.notes: Mailchimp import. Best source for opt-in dates and pre-migration tags.

airtable_sqsp.name: SQSP Profiles
airtable_sqsp.notes: Squarespace export. Has marketing consent, member areas, shipping/billing addresses, donation amounts.

airtable_3tier.name: 3 Tier Downloads
airtable_3tier.notes: Endo symptom self-survey form submissions. Leanest data but largest exclusive pool.

columns.email: TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE
columns.first_seen_at: TEXT — earliest date from any source
columns.user_id: TEXT REFERENCES user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL — link to site account

columns.contact_id: TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contact(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.source: TEXT — which system assigned this tag (airtable-master, airtable-sqsp, d1-label, manual)

columns.contact_id: TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contact(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.type: TEXT NOT NULL — shipping | billing | home

newsletter_subscriber_change.action: ALTER TABLE newsletter_subscriber ADD COLUMN contact_id TEXT REFERENCES contact(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
newsletter_subscriber_change.backfill: UPDATE newsletter_subscriber SET contact_id = (SELECT id FROM contact WHERE contact.email = newsletter_subscriber.email)

conflict_resolution.first_name: D1 > Airtable Master > SQSP > 3 Tier (first non-null wins)
conflict_resolution.last_name: D1 > Airtable Master > SQSP (3 Tier has single Name field)
conflict_resolution.source: Airtable Master Source > SQSP Subscriber Source (earliest known)
conflict_resolution.landing_page: Airtable Master Landing Page > 3 Tier Landing Page
conflict_resolution.first_seen_at: MIN(all dates across all sources) — earliest wins
conflict_resolution.total_spent: MAX(Airtable Master Total Spent, SQSP Total Spent) — highest wins
conflict_resolution.accepts_marketing: 1 if SQSP Accepts Marketing = true, else 0

first_seen_at_sources.airtable_sqsp: Subscriber Since (text, needs parsing) OR Customer Since
first_seen_at_sources.airtable_3tier: earliest Submitted On for this email

tag_mapping._strategy: All tags are cleaned and normalized. Every mapping is explicit. null = do not import.

from_d1_user_label._note: These already exist as user_labels. Mirror into contact_tag with source=d1-label.
from_d1_user_label.pass_through: ALL existing user_label values are copied as-is into contact_tag

from_3tier._auto: Every 3 Tier Download record gets tag: survey:endo-self-survey

donor.condition: total_donated > 0 OR D1 user_label contains 'Donor 👏' OR 'Circle of Impact 📥'

newsletter_segment_derivation._note: After contact + contact_tag are populated, derive newsletter_subscriber.segments from contact_tag
newsletter_segment_derivation.stuc: D1 user_label contains any Save the Uterus label
newsletter_segment_derivation.survey-lead: contact_tag contains 'survey:endo-self-survey' AND NOT 'customer' AND NOT 'student'

execution_order: 2. Fetch all 4 sources into local JSON cache
3. Merge all sources by email into unified contact records
4. DRY RUN: print summary counts and 10 sample records per category
5. On confirmation: batch INSERT into contact table
7. Batch INSERT into contact_address (from SQSP shipping/billing + AT Master address)

filters.exclude_spam: Airtable Check = '🚩' OR D1 user_label contains 'Spam 🛑' or 'DO NOT SEND LIST 🛑'

safety.no_destructive_ops: Never UPDATE or DELETE existing data
safety.dry_run_required: Script prints full summary before any writes
safety.rollback_contact: DELETE FROM contact WHERE created_at >= '[run timestamp]'
safety.rollback_tags: DELETE FROM contact_tag WHERE source IN ('airtable-master','airtable-sqsp','airtable-3tier','d1-label')
safety.rollback_newsletter: UPDATE newsletter_subscriber SET contact_id = NULL WHERE contact_id IS NOT NULL
